testcase.name: test_request_failure

mock_requests_get = <MagicMock name='get' id='4405959440'> fivesim = <ninjemail.sms_services.fivesim.FiveSim object at 0x106a25b90>

testcase.name: test_get_phone
testcase.failure:
mock_requests_get = <MagicMock name='get' id='4405892112'> fivesim = <ninjemail.sms_services.fivesim.FiveSim object at 0x1069bd1d0>
def test_get_phone(mock_requests_get, fivesim): mock_requests_get.return_value.json.return_value = { "phone": "+1234567890", "id": "order123" } phone, order_id = fivesim.get_phone() > assert phone == "234567890" E AssertionError: assert <MagicMock name='get().result().json().__getitem__().removeprefix().removeprefix()' id='4405058960'> == '234567890'
ninjemail/tests/test_sms_5sim.py:45: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_get_code
test_get_phone_with_prefix
testcase.failure:
mock_requests_get = <MagicMock name='get' id='4405068496'> fivesim = <ninjemail.sms_services.fivesim.FiveSim object at 0x106d3f110>
def test_get_phone_with_prefix(mock_requests_get, fivesim): mock_requests_get.return_value.json.return_value = { "phone": "+1234567890", "id": "order123" } phone, order_id = fivesim.get_phone(send_prefix=True) > assert phone == "1234567890" E AssertionError: assert <MagicMock name='get().result().json().__getitem__().removeprefix()' id='4406278288'> == '1234567890'
ninjemail/tests/test_sms_5sim.py:61: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_get_phone
testcase.failure:
mock_requests_post = <MagicMock name='post' id='4406773584'> sms_pool = <ninjemail.sms_services.smspool.SMSPool object at 0x106606390>
def test_get_phone(mock_requests_post, sms_pool): mock_requests_post.return_value.json.return_value = { "success": True, "number": "1234567890", "phonenumber": "234567890", "order_id": "order123" } phone, order_id = sms_pool.get_phone() > assert phone == "234567890" E AssertionError: assert <MagicMock name='post().result().json().__getitem__()' id='4405062160'> == '234567890'
ninjemail/tests/test_sms_smspool.py:46: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_get_code
testcase.failure:
mock_requests_post = <MagicMock name='post' id='4347093136'> sms_pool = <ninjemail.sms_services.smspool.SMSPool object at 0x1066efc50>
def test_get_code(mock_requests_post, sms_pool): mock_requests_post.return_value.json.return_value = { "success": True, "sms": "12345" } code = sms_pool.get_code("order123") > assert code == "12345" E AssertionError: assert <MagicMock name='post().result().json().__getitem__()' id='4405844624'> == '12345'
ninjemail/tests/test_sms_smspool.py:55: AssertionError

testcase.failure:
mock_requests_post = <MagicMock name='post' id='4403828496'> sms_pool = <ninjemail.sms_services.smspool.SMSPool object at 0x1067f9790>
def test_get_phone_with_prefix(mock_requests_post, sms_pool): mock_requests_post.return_value.json.return_value = { "success": True, "number": "1234567890", "phonenumber": "234567890", "order_id": "order123" } phone, order_id = sms_pool.get_phone(send_prefix=True) > assert phone == "1234567890" E AssertionError: assert <MagicMock name='post().result().json().__getitem__()' id='4406529744'> == '1234567890'
ninjemail/tests/test_sms_smspool.py:65: AssertionError

def test_get_code_error_response(mock_requests_post, mock_time_sleep, sms_pool): mock_time_sleep.side_effect = Exception("Test exception") mock_requests_post.return_value.json.return_value = { "success": False, "message": "Error message" } > with pytest.raises(Exception) as exc_info: E Failed: DID NOT RAISE <class 'Exception'>
